name: portfolio-moderno
description: Um portfólio moderno com React, TypeScript e Node.js com animações fluidas

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ..
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd frontend && npm run dev" "cd backend && npm run dev"
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm run build
scripts.start: concurrently "cd frontend && npm run preview" "cd backend && npm start"
